request_debug.prompt_preview:
You are the final consolidation step in a startup slopmortem pipeline. Earlier stages compared a fresh pitch against several historical startup failures and produced per-failure lessons. Your job: pick and rank the lessons that actually apply to THIS pitch, dedup paraphrases, and explain why each applies.

Rules:
- Only consolidate lessons from the input list. Do NOT invent new risks. If a theme spans multiple lessons, write one canonical summary covering them.
- Drop lessons that do not apply t

response.text: {"top_risks":[{"summary":"Build creator monetization before scale or top users will leave for rivals that pay.","applies_because":"The pitch is ad-supported with no mention of creator revenue share; voice-note creators in college towers will be the supply side driving viral growth.","raised_by":["vine::social_communication","path::social_communication"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Validate ad CPM yield early — novelty DAUs from college virality do not automatically convert to ad revenue.","applies_because":"The pitch is explicitly ad-supported and relies on viral college-tower growth; both Vine and Yo showed novelty-driven audiences collapse before monetization matures.","raised_by":["yo::social_communication","vine::social_communication","path::social_communication"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Plan explicitly for incumbents copying your 30-second voice-note format; moat must come from community, not format.","applies_because":"The pitch's core mechanic — 30-second voice notes from a recurring location — is a narrow format constraint easily replicated by Instagram, TikTok, or Snapchat.","raised_by":["vine::social_communication","friendster::social_communication"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Build retention habit triggers into the product; post-hype plateau will kill the platform without an engagement floor.","applies_because":"The pitch highlights 'viral in college towers' — a novelty signal; a single recurring voice-note mechanic mirrors Yo's single-ping loop that collapsed when media attention faded.","raised_by":["yo::social_communication","path::social_communication"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Respect user privacy and data from day one; bake compliance into MVP before viral scale exposes you.","applies_because":"The pitch involves location data ('single recurring location') and a social app collecting user-generated content, creating the same surface area as Path's unauthorized contact harvesting that triggered FTC action.","raised_by":["path::social_communication"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Validate that hyper-local college-tower virality can translate to scalable ad inventory before raising growth capital.","applies_because":"The pitch's geographic constraint ('college towers') caps audience supply; Path's Indonesia traction and Vine's hyper-local CPM limits both show niche virality does not automatically scale ad revenue.","raised_by":["vine::social_communication","path::social_communication"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Never abandon the 30-second/location constraint under growth pressure — protect it as the core differentiator.","applies_because":"The pitch's entire identity is the combination of 30-second voice notes and a single recurring location; Path destroyed its own differentiator by removing its friend limit when growth stalled.","raised_by":["path::social_communication","friendster::social_communication"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Ensure security infrastructure is production-grade before viral scale reaches peak exposure.","applies_because":"The pitch involves user location data and audio recordings in a viral college environment; Yo's phone-number hack at peak popularity caused lasting credibility damage in a comparable micro-interaction social app.","raised_by":["yo::social_communication"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Prioritize platform performance and reliability before scaling beyond the initial college cluster.","applies_because":"The pitch targets viral growth in college towers where load spikes are likely; Friendster lost its early adopter base primarily to slow load times and bugs, not concept failure.","raised_by":["friendster::social_communication"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Design advertiser products native to the 30-second voice-note format proactively, before growth peaks.","applies_because":"The pitch is ad-supported on a novel audio format; Vine failed to build native ad products before growth peaked, leaving it unable to monetize at scale.","raised_by":["vine::social_communication"],"severity":"low"}],"injection_detected":false}
